title: Fees, decision times and where to apply :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Fees, decision times and where to apply
Find out how much it costs to apply, where to send your application or passport, and how long a decision will take.

## Visa applications and processing times
Processing times for visas we are considering varies for each visa.
How long it takes to process a visa

## Fees and receiving centre
Search for the information you need to:
- apply for visas and expressions of interest
- register for a ballot
- apply for employer schemes, accreditation and approvals
- keep your visa and passport up to date.
